title: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) May Find a Bottom Soon, Here's Why You Should Buy the Stock Now
text: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) appears to have found support after losing some value lately, as indicated by the formation of a hammer chart. In addition to this technical chart pattern, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher enhances the stock's potential for a turnaround in the near term.

title: 5 Bank Stocks to Buy as Fed Signals Faster Rate Hikes
text: The Fed is signaling a more hawkish stance, leading to a faster-than-expected hike in interest rates. Banks including Comerica (CMA), Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB), Wells Fargo (WFC), East West Bancorp (EWBC) and Western Alliance (WAL) are set to gain.
